text.value: During the past 12 months, did you have a non-regular sex partner?
During the past 12 months have you had sex with someone who was HIV-positive or whose HIV status you don’t know?
During the past 12 months, have you or your partner been diagnosed with or received treatment for a sexually transmitted infection?
During the past 12 months, have you received money or goods in exchange for sex?
During the past 12 months, have you ever injected drugs?
During the past 12 months, have you had sex with a man?
Does client report previous use of antiretrovirals for treatment?
Number of HIV self-test kits distributed
PrEP has been requested by the client
Prophylaxis course has been correctly and completely taken
Clinically assessed as being opioid dependent
Inducted on OAMT and on an increasing dose
Reducing dose of OAMT for managed treatment completion
Multiple take home daily doses dispensed?
